articles.title: Bangkok fire investigation finds locked doors and flammable decor as deaths climb to 30
articles.summary: Survivors and first responders reported locked doors and a lack of signage marking emergency exits.

articles.title: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal
articles.summary: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".

articles.title: Yemen's Houthis launch missiles at Saudi Arabia after strikes on Sanaa airport
articles.summary: The Iran-backed Houthis blame Saudi Arabia for the attack in Yemen's capital and say they targeted Abha airport in response.

articles.title: Australian police reveal unseen photos 25 years after British backpacker murder
articles.summary: Police hope the images could jog memories that will help them find the body of Peter Falconio.

articles.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
articles.summary: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.

articles.title: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
articles.summary: The judge said the suit was brought for 'improper purposes' and referred a Trump attorney for possible disciplinary action.

articles.title: Colombian national killed by ICE agent during operation in Maine
articles.summary: It comes less than a week after an undocumented migrant was fatally shot in Houston by an immigration agent.

articles.title: Identity of Sydney daycare worker facing 329 child abuse offences revealed
articles.summary: Hamish Tait is accused of abusing 136 children at five childcare facilities over a 16-year period.

articles.title: EU bans gold imports from Sudan to curb money financing the war
articles.summary: The ban also restricts exports of mercury and cyanide to Sudan, chemicals widely used in gold mining.

articles.title: Bison rams grandfather in Yellowstone Park, knocking him metres into the air
articles.summary: The man and his grandson appeared a safe distance away from the bison before it quickly chased them down.
